mapper.select: SELECT FROM migration_in WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM migration_out WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE migration_in SET person_id=#{v.personId},migration_type=#{v.migrationType},from_region_code=#{v.fromRegionCode},from_address=#{v.fromAddress},to_region_code=#{v.toRegionCode},to_household_id=#{v.toHouseholdId},in_date=#{v.inDate},reason=#{v.reason},transfer_batch_no=#{v.transferBatchNo},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{v.applicationId} AND business_status='DRAFT' AND version=#{expectedVersion}

UPDATE migration_out SET person_id=#{v.personId},migration_type=#{v.migrationType},to_region_code=#{v.toRegionCode},to_address=#{v.toAddress},out_date=#{v.outDate},reason=#{v.reason},new_head_person_id=#{v.newHeadPersonId},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{v.applicationId} AND business_status='DRAFT' AND version=#{expectedVersion}

UPDATE migration_in SET business_status=#{to},operator_id=COALESCE(#{operatorId},operator_id),executed_at=CASE WHEN #{to}='COMPLETED' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE executed_at END,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} AND business_status=#{from} AND version=#{expectedVersion}

UPDATE migration_out SET business_status=#{to},operator_id=COALESCE(#{operatorId},operator_id),transfer_batch_no=COALESCE(#{batchNo},transfer_batch_no),executed_at=CASE WHEN #{to}='COMPLETED' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE executed_at END,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} AND business_status=#{from} AND version=#{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM residence WHERE person_id=#{personId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM residence WHERE residence_id=#{id} AND version=#{version}
mapper.select: SELECT h.household_id,h.household_no,h.head_person_id,h.address,h.region_code,h.status,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM household_member m WHERE m.household_id=h.household_id AND m.status='ACTIVE') active_member_count FROM household h WHERE h.household_id=#{id}

SELECT h.household_id,h.household_no,h.head_person_id,h.address,h.region_code,h.status,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM household_member m WHERE m.household_id=h.household_id AND m.status='ACTIVE') active_member_count FROM household h WHERE h.household_id=#{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT person_id FROM household_member WHERE household_id=#{id} AND status='ACTIVE' ORDER BY member_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM household_member WHERE person_id=#{personId} AND status='ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE household_member SET status='ACTIVE',join_date=#{date},leave_date=NULL,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE household_id=#{householdId} AND person_id=#{personId} AND status='LEFT'
UPDATE household_member SET status='LEFT',leave_date=#{date},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE household_id=#{householdId} AND person_id=#{personId} AND status='ACTIVE'
UPDATE household SET head_person_id=#{newHead},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE household_id=#{householdId} AND head_person_id=#{oldHead}
UPDATE household SET status='PENDING_CANCELLATION',head_person_id=NULL,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE household_id=#{householdId} AND head_person_id=#{oldHead}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO residence_archive(original_registration_id,person_id,household_id,application_id,migration_out_id,archive_type,archive_reason,person_name_snapshot,identity_no_snapshot,household_no_snapshot,registered_address_snapshot,region_code_snapshot,register_type_code_snapshot,register_date_snapshot,start_date_snapshot,end_date_snapshot,original_status,archived_by,archived_at) SELECT #{originalRegistrationId},#{personId},#{householdId},#{applicationId},#{migrationOutId},#{archiveType},#{archiveReason},p.name,p.id_card,h.household_no,#{registeredAddressSnapshot},#{regionCodeSnapshot},#{registerTypeCodeSnapshot},#{registerDateSnapshot},#{startDateSnapshot},#{endDateSnapshot},#{originalStatus},#{archivedBy},CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM person p JOIN household h ON h.household_id=#{householdId} WHERE p.person_id=#{personId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM residence_archive ORDER BY archived_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM migration_out WHERE transfer_batch_no=#{batchNo} AND business_status='COMPLETED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM migration_in WHERE transfer_batch_no=#{batchNo} AND business_status='COMPLETED'
